text:
September 4th: Part 12 (94⑫, Kugatsu Yokka (Jū Ni)) is the 113 th chapter of the Hunter × Hunter manga, written and illustrated by Yoshihiro Togashi.

Synopsis

As the storm rages on outside the Hotel Beitacle, Gon and Killua note that there are three minutes left until they carry out their plan. After Shizuku spots Nobunaga, Pakunoda, and Kortopi entering the hotel, Nobunaga is ecstatic to see the two boys again and coyly suggests that they changed their mind about joining the Phantom Troupe. Killua tells him that they didn't know their bounties had been canceled, and Nobunaga criticizes their tailing skills, adding that it must be fate that they're meeting again.

Killua checks the clock and sees that there are two minutes left. Nobunaga asks the two to be his friends, but Killua refuses and repeats that they were only following them because of the reward, closing his eyes and saying that they don't even want to look at their faces. Gon realizes what Killua is doing and closes his eyes as well. Nobunaga likens their attitude to Uvogin's and asks Chrollo what he thinks of them, but Machi says that they are fearless only because they're kids, asking Nobunaga what the chain user is like. However, Chrollo asks Pakunoda to first check the boys again, telling her to ask what they are hiding.

Killua realizes that the question will allow Pakunoda to read many of their memories at once, worried that they won't be able to carry out their plan in time. The announcer on Leorio's radio says that they are down to their last minute, and Killua tries his best to stall Pakunoda by saying that it would be pointless to read them since they have nothing to hide. However, Pakunoda grabs Killua's face and tells him to be quiet, with Gon adding that they will stop them even if they do find out what they're hiding. Pakunoda grabs Gon's face as well and says that they misunderstand her ability, explaining that she extracts the memories from beneath their consciousness. She adds that her questions cause the original memories to float up to the surface and that they cannot be falsified.

The time reaches 7 o'clock and Pakunoda asks what the two boys are hiding, but the moment she reads their memories, the power suddenly goes out and shrouds the hotel lobby in darkness. With his eyes already adjusted to the darkness, Killua finishes dislocating his wrists to free himself from Machi's restraints, quickly breaking Pakunoda's left arm. But before she can react, Gon kicks her in the chin and Machi realizes that Killua freed himself. As Machi understands what they were plotting, Killua suddenly kicks her in the side and forces her away from Gon. However, Machi refuses to let Gon get away and pulls back on the thread, sending Gon flying back from Killua.

Killua realizes that he will have to kill Machi to sever her thread. He forces his hand into her chest toward her heart, but Machi traps it with her muscles and pulls him in tight, saying that the darkness couldn't hide his bloodlust and that he should aim for the neck. Gon realizes that Killua has been caught, but when he tries to help him, Nobunaga uses his En and grabs Gon by the ankle, saying that he can tell where he is even in the darkness.

As Nobunaga holds Gon upside down and praises the boys' idea, a knife suddenly flies toward him and sticks in the wall behind him. He says that it came from the door and must have been a final shot. Shizuku realizes that the man with the radio was also involved and guesses that he already left. Nobunaga adds that he probably threw the knife and says that they just need the two boys, assuring the others that their eyes will soon adjust. However, before Shizuku can finish her next sentence, she suddenly realizes that Chrollo is missing.
